product.name: ArGiyim 245 Static Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra Durable, Ultra Breathable Front Side Polyester Back Side Cotton, PolyCotton Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 79% Polyester 20% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton Antistatic Water Repellent Twill Fabric
product.specLine: 245 g/m², 79% Polyester 20% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
descriptions: 79% Polyester 20% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton antistatic, chemical resistant twill fabric. The front side of the fabric is 100% Polyester which is ultra durable for work conditions and light, the back side of the fabric is cotton which provides breathability to the user.
ArGiyim²45 Static Pro are used in pans and trousers in clean rooms.
Certified for EN ISO 1149-5(1149-3 Method 3) and for EN 13034
79% Polyester 20% Cotton 1% Carbon PolyCotton Antistatic Water Repellent Twill Fabric
245 g/m², 79% Polyester 20% Cotton 1% Carbon Antistatic, Chemical Resistant, 3/1 S Twill Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 79% Polyester (PES) 20% Cotton (CO) 1% Carbon (CF) | EN ISO 2076
Yarn | 300 Denier + 12/1 Ne + 40 Denier | EN ISO 2060
Tensile Strength | Warp > 1800N ; Weft > 600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 30N ; Weft > 25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: technicalParameters: High Visibility | Done | EN ISO 20471
technicalParameters: Application | Hi Vis Antistatic Pans
applicationImageLabels: Polycotton antistatic jacket, Polycotton antistatic suit
acceptedMatches.rationale: The product is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 for high-visibility apparel and its stated application is 'Hi Vis Antistatic Pans', directly supporting the hi-vis application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic (EN 1149) and EMI shielding properties are present but there is no explicit statement of use in electrical utilities, high-voltage work or electrical installations, so this alone is insufficient per the exclusion rule.
Description mentions use 'in pans and trousers in clean rooms', which suggests cleanroom garments but does not explicitly state a medical, healthcare or hospital use.

evidence: technicalParameters: High Visibility | Done | EN ISO 20471
technicalParameters: Application | Hi Vis Antistatic Pans
applicationImageLabels: Polycotton antistatic jacket, Polycotton antistatic suit
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 for high-visibility apparel and its stated application field explicitly labels it as a hi-vis garment fabric, making this the most direct and dominant end use.

evidence: Used in pans and trousers in clean rooms
Antistatic EN 1149 for industrial/clean room protective use
secondary.rationale: Beyond hi-vis, the fabric is positioned as general industrial protective clothing for clean rooms and chemical exposure, supporting a secondary general workwear/industrial use.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Antistatic and EMI properties present but no explicit statement of electrical utility or high-voltage work use, per exclusion rule.
Clean room mention suggests industrial cleanroom use, not explicit medical/healthcare context.
